---
title: "\'March 7th, 1863\'"
---

## \'March 7th, 1863\'

**Author:** Ann Maria Carter Smith
**Date:** 1863
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (April 1863) 412-8

### Notes

This account of the procession of the wedding of the Prince of Wales and Princess Alexandra is ascribed to Ann Carter Smith on the authority of CMY\'s letter of acknowledgment.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
